projectDescription: A highly customizable, blazing-fast Zsh theme with a built-in configuration wizard, instant prompt, transient prompt, and dozens of built-in prompt segments.
keyFeatures: Instant prompt — displays prompt immediately on Zsh startup even when plugins are still loading
Configuration wizard — interactive `p10k configure` command to customize appearance without editing files
Transient prompt — trims previous prompts to a minimal form for cleaner scrollback
Show on command — context-sensitive segments that appear only when relevant commands are typed
Powerlevel9k compatibility — drop-in replacement that reads all POWERLEVEL9K_* config parameters
Pure compatibility — can replicate the Pure Zsh theme style
60+ built-in prompt segments — git status, AWS, Kubernetes, Python, Node.js, and many more
Extensible custom segments via public p10k segment API
Smart directory truncation — shortens paths to unique prefixes with color-coded importance
Asynchronous Git status via gitstatus daemon for zero prompt lag
publicApiSurface: p10k configure — launch interactive configuration wizard
p10k segment — define or render a custom prompt segment
p10k display — show/hide prompt segments at runtime
p10k finalize — mark instant prompt initialization complete
p10k clear-instant-prompt — clear the instant prompt
POWERLEVEL9K_LEFT_PROMPT_ELEMENTS — array of left-side prompt segments
POWERLEVEL9K_RIGHT_PROMPT_ELEMENTS — array of right-side prompt segments
POWERLEVEL9K_MODE — icon set mode (nerdfont-complete, powerline, ascii, etc.)
POWERLEVEL9K_<SEGMENT>_SHOW_ON_COMMAND — regex of commands that trigger a segment
POWERLEVEL9K_CONFIG_FILE — path to the p10k config file (default ~/.p10k.zsh)
p10k-instant-prompt-finalize — zsh function to finalize instant prompt from .zshrc
